480 O0100B2_RDTN_POST_CD O0100B2_RDTN_POST_CD O0100B2 Special Treatments/Programs: Radiation Post-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received radiation within the last 14 days while a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
